title: Cheese Grater, Box Grater for Cheese Stainless Steel Vegetable Slicer Food Shredder 4-Sided Graters for Kitchen
features: [4 IN 1, CUTTING HAD NEVER BEEN SO EASY] 4 different sharp blade helps you deal with almost all kind of kitchen cutting job. Having great performance in both slicing, grating, and shredding. Need Shredded cheese?Potato chips? cucumber slice?Carrot stick? It will be no difficulty when you work with this 4 in 1 box grater!

[FIRMLY FIXED, NO WORRY ABOUT GRATER SLIP DURING YOUR JOB] Be careful! Finger gets hurt easily when the sharp blade you're using gets slipped! Our product is designed with an ergonomic rubber handle and base, which can efficiently avoid slip during use and reduce the risk of finger cutting.
[SAY GOODBYE TO THE TROUBLE OF RUST AND FOOD RESIDUE]Senior 430 stainless steel blade, sharp and durable，never worry about it will get rust and give your food an unpleasant rusty taste.

[EASY HAND WASHING BUT ALSO DISHWASHER SAFE] In the case of handwashing, you can simply clean it under running water. And if you own a dishwasher, things became easier--what you need to do is put this box grater in the machine! Please be aware that, we recommend you take the removable rubber base off before washing it. This will make sure you clean all the mess that may hide in the rubber base and farewell to the risk of any rust happening.

[EXCELLENT SERVICE] In case of any unhappiness during your purchase, we offer you a satisfaction-guaranteed after-sale service. Please contact us through the order page, we'll reply to you within 24 hours and solve your problem with 48 hours!
